name: VonageConnector
description: Vonage (formerly Nexmo) CPaaS connector covering SMS, Voice (programmable calls + recordings), Verify v2 (2FA), Numbers, and Applications surfaces. Dual-mode auth: HTTP Basic (api_key + api_secret) for SMS/Verify/Numbers/Account, RS256 JWT (application_id + private_key) for Voice.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Vonage API key — Dashboard → Getting Started → API key.

install_fields.label: API Secret
install_fields.help: Vonage API secret — Dashboard → Getting Started → API secret. Stored encrypted, never returned.

install_fields.label: Application ID (optional)
install_fields.help: Vonage Application UUID — required only for Voice / Messages / Conversations endpoints. Create one in Dashboard → Applications.

install_fields.label: Private Key (PEM, optional)
install_fields.help: RSA private key (PEM) downloaded when the Vonage Application was created. Used to sign RS256 JWTs for Voice / Messages. Stored encrypted, never returned.

install_fields.label: Webhook Signing Secret
install_fields.help: Vonage webhook signing secret — used to verify HS256 JWTs on inbound callbacks (Dashboard → Settings → Signed webhooks).

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft client-side advisory only — Vonage enforces server-side. Default 30 (Standard account).

apis.name: Install
apis.description: Validate required config keys and initialise the HTTP client. No API call.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probe /account/get-balance to verify api_key + api_secret.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Aggregate recent SMS + voice calls into NormalizedDocument batches.

apis.name: Get Account Balance
apis.description: GET /account/get-balance — returns {value, autoReload}.

apis.name: Send SMS
apis.description: POST /sms/json — send an SMS. Payload includes from, to, text, type?. Envelope-checked.

apis.name: Get SMS Status
apis.description: GET /search/message — look up the state of a previously-sent SMS.

apis.name: List Messages
apis.description: GET /search/messages — paginated list of recent SMS for this account.

apis.name: Create Call
apis.description: POST /v1/calls — place an outbound voice call. Payload must include to + (ncco | answer_url). JWT auth.

apis.name: Get Call
apis.description: GET /v1/calls/{uuid} — fetch a single call's state. JWT auth.

apis.name: Update Call
apis.description: PUT /v1/calls/{uuid} — change call state (hangup, mute, etc.). JWT auth.

apis.name: List Calls
apis.description: GET /v1/calls — paginated list of voice calls. JWT auth.

apis.name: Download Call Recording
apis.description: GET <recording_url> — download a recording's audio bytes. JWT auth.

apis.name: Send Verify Request
apis.description: POST /v2/verify — start a phone-number verification (sms/voice/email/whatsapp workflow).

apis.name: Check Verify Code
apis.description: POST /v2/verify/{request_id} — submit the OTP the user entered.

apis.name: Cancel Verify
apis.description: DELETE /v2/verify/{request_id} — abort an in-flight verification.

apis.name: List Owned Numbers
apis.description: GET /account/numbers — phone numbers currently owned by this account.

apis.name: Search Available Numbers
apis.description: GET /number/search — find numbers available to purchase.

apis.name: Buy Number
apis.description: POST /number/buy — provision a number into this account.

apis.name: Cancel Number
apis.description: POST /number/cancel — release a number from this account.

apis.name: List Applications
apis.description: GET /v2/applications — list Vonage applications for this account.

apis.name: Handle Webhook
apis.description: Verify Vonage signature (if configured) then route by event_type.

apis.name: Process Callback
apis.description: Verify a Vonage callback's HS256 JWT Authorization header (falls back to HMAC-SHA256 of X-Vonage-Signature).

apis.name: Handle Event
apis.description: Idempotency-keyed event acknowledgement.

apis.name: Batch Processor
apis.description: Iterate events through handle_event with per-item error capture.
